description.r1: Increases DMG against opponents affected by Hydro or Pyro by 12%.
description.r2: Increases DMG against opponents affected by Hydro or Pyro by 15%.
description.r3: Increases DMG against opponents affected by Hydro or Pyro by 18%.
description.r4: Increases DMG against opponents affected by Hydro or Pyro by 21%.
description.r5: Increases DMG against opponents affected by Hydro or Pyro by 24%.

description.r1: Increases DMG against weak spots by 24%.
description.r2: Increases DMG against weak spots by 30%.
description.r3: Increases DMG against weak spots by 36%.
description.r4: Increases DMG against weak spots by 42%.
description.r5: Increases DMG against weak spots by 48%.

description.r1: If a Normal or Charged Attack hits a target within 0.3s of being fired, increases DMG by 36%. Otherwise, decreases DMG by 10%.
description.r2: If a Normal or Charged Attack hits a target within 0.3s of being fired, increases DMG by 42%. Otherwise, decreases DMG by 10%.
description.r3: If a Normal or Charged Attack hits a target within 0.3s of being fired, increases DMG by 48%. Otherwise, decreases DMG by 10%.
description.r4: If a Normal or Charged Attack hits a target within 0.3s of being fired, increases DMG by 54%. Otherwise, decreases DMG by 10%.
description.r5: If a Normal or Charged Attack hits a target within 0.3s of being fired, increases DMG by 60%. Otherwise, decreases DMG by 10%.

description.r1: Charged Attack hits on weak points deal an additional 100% ATK DMG as CRIT DMG. Can only occur once every 10s.
description.r2: Charged Attack hits on weak points deal an additional 125% ATK DMG as CRIT DMG. Can only occur once every 10s.
description.r3: Charged Attack hits on weak points deal an additional 150% ATK DMG as CRIT DMG. Can only occur once every 10s.
description.r4: Charged Attack hits on weak points deal an additional 175% ATK DMG as CRIT DMG. Can only occur once every 10s.
description.r5: Charged Attack hits on weak points deal an additional 200% ATK DMG as CRIT DMG. Can only occur once every 10s.
